issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {GERMA 66} type, not just HasCardOnBoard. Should be: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"GERMA 66"}
First action should be TrashFromHand targeting this Character (self), not a generic trash. The card text says 'You may trash this Character' as a condition/cost for the play effect.
PlayFromHand should search both hand AND trash ("or trash" in text). Current DSL only targets hand. Should include trash as valid source.
Trigger should be "Activated" with cost/resource specification. The DON!! −1 cost and the optional trash of this character are separate from the main effect.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] DON!! −1: You may trash this Character: If your Leader has the {GERMA 66} type, play up to 1 [Vinsmoke Yonji] with a cost of 4 from your hand or trash.
